LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF SST INVESTMENTS, LLC'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS DENIED. SST INVESTMENTS, LLC HAS NOT DEMONSTRATED THAT THE INTERIM HARM THAT IT IS LIKELY TO SUSTAIN IF THE INJUNCTION IS DENIED IS GREATER AS COMPARED TO THE HARM THAT SAN FRANCISCO CAR WASH COMPANY, LLC IS LIKELY TO SUFFER IF THE COURT GRANTS A MANDATORY PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. Off Calendar Apr-23-2012 Set For Trial On Dec-03-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar May-04-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Apr-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Sufi Tahbazof Hariri, Esq., from Tahbazof Law Firm, 415-922-0200, ext. 201 and Ross McLauran Madden, Esq., Law Office, 415-567-1212 for plaintiff and moving party
Kevin M. Clarke, Esq., from Law Offices of Glaspy & Glaspy, Inc., 925-947-1300, for defendant and opposing party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF SST INVESTMENTS, LLC's Motion For Preliminary Injunction is Denied. SST Investments, LLC has not demonstrated that the interim harm that it is likely to sustain if the injunction is denied is greater as compared to the harm that San Francisco Car Wash Company, LLC is likely to suffer if the court grants a mandatory preliminary injunction. Order signed in open court. Judge: James J. McBride; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

Notice Of Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Mar-14-2012 Continued To Apr-11-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
